title: CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS - 211info
text: LAKE DISTRICT HOSPITAL CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides car seat inspections, help with installation, and car seats. 700 S J Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 947-2114 386 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-2114 ext 386 Abigail Finetti Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Free or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Child Passenger Safety Seat Inspections Child Passenger Safety Seats Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - LAKE DISTRICT HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
